summary: Recording quality not mentioned; reviewers highlight an unusually ordered set list that hints at a shift after years of predictability.
review: The sole review points out the odd placement of songs in the set, noting it as a sign of change after six years of predictable shows. No details are provided about the audio source or sound quality, leaving the recording aspect unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review focusing on set‑list quirks; no information on performance excellence or recording fidelity, so rating stays moderate with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about sound quality, clarity, or mix were given.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer notes an unusual set‑list order, suggesting a departure from the band's six‑year pattern of predictable song placement.
